time_block: Phase 1.0 — MVP Daily Spine (minimal dosing events)

what_to_do_take:
Hydration Baseline [COP-23]
Optional: Black Coffee — 1–3 cups/day [CAS-FOOD-03]
notes: Default: 300–500 mL water on waking. Keep binder window clean; avoid taking other supplements immediately before psyllium.

what_to_do_take:
Psyllium — 5–10 g in water [CAS-GUT-01]
Carrot salad [CAS-FOOD-01]
notes: Fasted. Take psyllium with a full glass; wait 20–30 min before carrot salad. Keep other supplements/meds away from this window when possible.

what_to_do_take:
Taurine — 1g [CAS-LIV-01]
MSM — 750mg [CAS-LIV-02]
Molybdenum — 100-200mcg [CAS-LIV-03]
Creatine — 5g [CAS-MITO-01]
Undecylenic Acid — titrate 1→5 caps/day [CAS-FUNG-01]
notes: Take with first post-binder meal. Keep ≥60–90 min after psyllium when practical. Undecylenic acid is 'with meals'—split across meals if dosing >1 cap/day.

what_to_do_take:
Magnesium glycinate — 200-300mg [CAS-MICRO-03]
Glycine — 2-3g [CAS-AMINO-01]
notes: Sleep anchor. If insomnia worsens, reduce newest daytime additions before changing bedtime anchor.

what_to_do_take:
Hydration Baseline — Daily — On waking + throughout day [COP-23]
Sleep Optimization Practices — Daily — Evening [COP-14]
Diaphragmatic Breathwork — Daily — Any, especially pre-sleep [COP-12]
Pelvic Mobility Drills — Daily — AM or PM [COP-04]
Reverse Kegels — Daily — Any, especially pre/ post-sex [COP-01]
notes: MVP practice set (keep it short). Rule: no daily Angion (if used; Phase 2+).

what_to_do_take:
Beet extract — per label [CAS-VAS-08]
Vitamin C — 1g [CAS-ANTIOX-01]
Zinc — 20-30mg [CAS-MICRO-01]
Selenium — 100-200mcg [CAS-MICRO-02]
TUDCA — 250mg [CAS-LIV-04]
notes: Support add-ons (optional): add only when needed/tolerated; prefer 1 change at a time; de-escalate last-added first.
Experimental/cycled: keep to 1–2 active experiments at once; stop first if insomnia/wiredness/anxiety increases.

what_to_do_take:
Constipation → hold binder ramp / hold antifungal escalation.
Nausea/bile reflux/RUQ pain → hold bile-flow agents.
Insomnia/wired → remove newest stimulatory adds first.
Low BP/dizziness → reduce nitrates/vasodilators first.
notes: De-escalate last-added first; do not 'push through' constipation, nausea, insomnia, or bile reflux.
